# Feature: Artifact validation contract (Issue 3)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-09 -->

## Intent
Align pre-write validation with persisted scan artifacts so `confidence.json` is validated with the same shape that gets written — single AJV gate, no duplicate conflict inference when `fact.conflict` is set.

Roadmap: Clean Test Basis (Stufe A) — `.qa/design/clean-test-basis.md` Issue 3.

## Preconditions
- Issue 1 (`scan-merge-lean`) merged on `main`
- `validateArtifactsWithJsonSchema` and `buildConfidenceArtifact` exist in CLI/core
- Integration tests: `json-schema-validator.test.ts`, `version-history.test.ts`, `runtime-scan.integration.test.ts`

## Happy Path
- [ ] Given a completed scan pipeline, pre-write validation calls `validateArtifactsWithJsonSchema` with `buildConfidenceArtifact(facts, mergeConflicts)` — not a partial `{ scores }` stub
- [ ] Given persisted artifacts, the same `confidence` object written to disk is schema-validated before write
- [ ] Given facts with `fact.conflict` metadata, `buildConfidenceArtifact` projects that into `confidence.conflicts[]` without re-inferring winner via `conflictStatusFromMerge`
- [ ] `facts.schema.json` and `confidence.schema.json` validate hr-workflows scan output in `json-schema-validator.test.ts`
- [ ] `pnpm run verify` passes

## Edge Cases
- [ ] Merge conflicts without `fact.conflict` still infer status via `conflictStatusFromMerge` (backward compatible)
- [ ] Resolved conflicts with `selectedFactId` on `fact.conflict` pass through to confidence artifact

## Regression
- [ ] `version-history`, `hr-workflows`, `runtime-scan`, `plugins`, `recommendations` integration tests green
- [ ] `validate` CLI command still validates on-disk artifacts via AJV

## Assumptions
- `validateScanArtifacts` bulk helper is dead code — individual `isFact` / record guards remain for runtime loaders
- `markAffectedFactsStale` is redundant with `mergeRescanFacts` — remove export and test via merge path only
- `KnowledgeGraph.addFact` unused in production — tests migrate to `mergeFacts`
- `flow-step.ts` only consumed in tests — merge into `score.ts`

## Implementation Notes
- `packages/cli/src/commands/scan.ts` — build `confidence` once via `buildConfidenceArtifact`; validate and persist same object
- `packages/core/src/confidence/artifact.ts` — project `fact.conflict` when present; skip merge re-inference
- `packages/core/src/schemas/validate-artifacts.ts` — removed dead `validateScanArtifacts` bulk helper
- `packages/core/src/history/apply-stale.ts` — removed `markAffectedFactsStale`
- `packages/core/src/graph/knowledge-graph.ts` — removed unused `addFact`
- `packages/core/src/confidence/score.ts` — merged flow-step thresholds from deleted `flow-step.ts`
- Tests: `artifact.test.ts`, `history.test.ts`, graph/confidence tests updated
